why_choose: New York's only dedicated barber school — barbering is all we do.
Licensed by NY State Department of Education (BPSS).
30+ years of proven results with 10,000+ graduates.
Veterans & GI Bill® benefits accepted (ACCES-VR, Post-9/11 GI Bill®, VA).
Hands-on training in a real barber clinic from day one.
Real barbershop skills taught within the first few weeks.
Two campuses: Manhattan and the Bronx.

career_earnings.desc: Building a client base and refining technique.
Loyal clientele, faster service, increased income.
Full control of schedule and earnings.

faqs.q: How long does the Master Barber program take?
faqs.a: The 500-Hour Master Barber program runs about 17 weeks (≈4 months) full-time. Weekend students typically complete in 27 weeks.

faqs.q: Do I need prior experience to enroll?
faqs.a: No prior experience is required. We train you from the ground up, starting with the fundamentals and progressing to advanced cutting, fading, beard work, and shaving.
Yes. ABI is licensed by the New York State Department of Education through the Bureau of Proprietary School Supervision (BPSS).

faqs.q: What's the tuition and how do I pay?
faqs.a: Tuition ranges from $4,600 to $5,600 depending on schedule. Every plan starts with a small down payment and continues with low weekly payments — full breakdown on the Programs page.

faqs.q: Do you accept GI Bill® or VA benefits?
faqs.a: Yes. We accept Post-9/11 GI Bill®, VA benefits, and ACCES-VR. Our admissions advisors will walk you through the paperwork.

faqs.q: When is the next class start?
faqs.a: Our next start date is Monday, July 6, 2026. We accept new students on a rolling basis — contact admissions for the next available cohort.
Manhattan: 48 West 39th Street, New York, NY 10018. Bronx: 121 Westchester Square, Bronx, NY 10461.
Three flexible tracks: Morning (Mon–Fri 8AM–2PM), Afternoon (Mon–Fri 2PM–8PM), and Weekend (Sat–Sun 9AM–7PM).

faqs.q: Do you help with job placement?
faqs.a: Yes. Job placement services are included. Our network includes Levels, Diamond Fadez, Untouchable Cutz, Otis & Finn, and the NYC Barber Shop Museum.
Modern fades, haircutting, beard work, straight-razor shaving, styling, color, sanitation, business basics, and NY State Board Exam preparation.

faqs.q: Can I get a haircut at the school?
faqs.a: Yes — our student clinic offers haircuts from $3 (haircuts), giving our trainees real chair time while you get a great cut.
Yes. We work with veterans (VA, GI Bill®), ACCES-VR participants, and offer in-house weekly payment plans for every program.
We keep instructor-to-student ratios low to ensure every student gets real hands-on time on the floor.
You take the NY State Board Exam, earn your license, and start working. Our placement team helps you land your first chair.
Yes — Spanish-speaking advisors are available. Call (212) 290-0278 for Spanish admissions at the Manhattan campus.
